subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — I’m open to an introductory call next week. I’m available Tue–Thu between 14:00 and 17:00 UTC, and I can also make time outside that window with a bit of notice. If you send a couple of slots that work for your team, I’ll confirm one.

For now, I can’t share internal contact details or direct lines for colleagues, but I’m happy to help coordinate the right intro once we’ve got a time on the calendar.

Best,
[Your Name]
